creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
$ portmaster -a results in a console spam (e.g.)

<...>
tel:croscorefonts-1.31.0_2:x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf:dmenu-5.1:x11/dmenu:dwm-6.4:x11-wm/dwm:llvm15-15.0.7_7:devel/llvm15@default:rust-1.73.0:lang/rust:llvm15-15.0.7_7:devel/llvm15@default:llvm15-15.0.7_7:devel/llvm15@default:llvm15-15.0.7_7:devel/llvm15@default:
+ dep_of_deps=23
+ PM_NEEDS_UPDATE=' www/firefox devel/autoconf2.13 devel/autoconf-switch devel/m4 print/texinfo converters/p5-Text-Unidecode devel/gmake devel/p5-Locale-libintl misc/help2man textproc/p5-Unicode-EastAsianWidth devel/nasm devel/pkgconf devel/rust-cbindgen devel/wasi-compiler-rt15 devel/ninja devel/wasi-libc devel/wasi-libcxx15 devel/yasm multimedia/v4l_compat devel/evdev-proto www/node www/node20 '
+ safe_exit 1
+ [ -n '' ]
+ [ 93640 -eq 77078 ]
+ :
+ [ -z pm_first_pass ]
+ [ '' '=' pmp_doing_build_deps ]
+ echo $'num_of_deps=\'23\''
+ echo $'build_l=\'\\tUpgrade firefox-120.0_2,2 to firefox-120.0.1,2\\n\\t
<...>
